name: rp2040_s3jtag_full
description: Rule-B full pack for RP2040 via S3JTAG. This convenience layer currently consists of the Stage 0 mailbox baseline, the validated Stage 1 no-wire self-tests, and the validated Stage 2 wired integration tests.
notes: Pack-level board is intentionally omitted so each test keeps its own board profile. This pack now includes the validated Stage 1 internal temperature and timer no-wire self-tests alongside the existing Stage 0 and Stage 2 coverage. Every formal full-suite closeout must also record the validated esp32jtag_firmware commit used by the bench.
